title: Blackout Firefly Bush
description: Removes the blinking firefly animation from the Firefly Bush, eliminating the repeating pattern for a cleaner, more consistent and natural look.
body:
# Blackout Firefly Bush ### This resource pack specifically modifies the newly added firefly bush introduced in Minecraft Java Edition snapshot 25w05a, offering a refined and more natural aesthetic.
This alters the firefly bush emissive pack, removing the animation specifically used for the fireflies within the bush. While one may be beautiful, having multiple together doesn't look as good.
Video Preview (Swamp)
Video Preview (Village)

**Key Features:** - **Eliminates repetitive animations:** Removes the blinking fireflies that disrupt the visual continuity of foliage, creating a more serene and cohesive environment. - **Maintains Compatibility:** Full compatibility with vanilla resource packs and most mods. **Who is this for?** - **Minimalist Players:** Creates a cleaner, more natural look for the bushes, especially during the day when fireflies are supposed to be nocturnal, improving the overall visual experience. - **Creative Builders:** Ideal for builders who require predictable and consistent texture behavior for landscaping projects. - **Survivalists:** Players who want to reduce visual distractions during gameplay.
